response.justification: Bogdan brings strong full-stack engineering credentials and is currently at Google contributing to MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks, which is directly relevant. However, the AI-specific depth required for this Staff FDE role is largely absent or undemonstrated: Python is not listed anywhere in his skills, there is no mention of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph or CrewAI. His AI exposure appears to be recent (current Google role, ~13 months) rather than the 8+ years of production-grade AI delivery the role demands. His background is primarily in software craftsmanship, data integration, and platform engineering — valuable foundations, but not a substitute for the applied GenAI specialization this role requires.
strengths: Currently working on MCP infrastructure and agentic workflows at Google, directly overlapping with the role's key technologies
15+ years of polyglot engineering across TypeScript, cloud platforms (AWS CDK at Meta), and distributed systems — strong integration and delivery fundamentals
Demonstrated staff-level scope: mentorship, open-source project ownership, public talks, and cross-domain technical leadership across multiple employers
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the resume and skills list, yet it is the primary required language for this role
No evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation/observability pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks — the core technical requirements of the position
The AI work described is concentrated in the last ~13 months; the role demands 8+ years of production-grade AI solution delivery, which this profile does not satisfy

key_factors.factor: MCP and agentic workflow experience at Google
No RAG / vector DB / LLM eval experience
